# Tolley.io
> Kansas City rentals, real estate, and services — powered by Your KC Homes LLC
> https://www.tolley.io

## Services

- [Trailer Rental](https://www.tolley.io/trailer) — Enclosed cargo trailers (5×8 to 8.5×20), daily/weekly/monthly pricing
- [Washer & Dryer Rental](https://www.tolley.io/wd) — Appliance rentals starting at $42/mo
- [Generator Rental](https://www.tolley.io/generator) — FIRMAN T07571 tri-fuel generator, 7500W running
- [HVAC Services](https://www.tolley.io/hvac) — The Cool Guys Heating & Air Conditioning, 24/7 service
- [Last-Mile Delivery](https://www.tolley.io/lastmile) — Red Alert Dispatch, 3000+ deliveries, $2/mile
- [Real Estate](https://www.tolley.io/homes) — Jared Tolley, United Real Estate Kansas City
- [Moving Supply Rental](https://www.tolley.io/moving) — Totes, blankets, rubber bands bundle
- [Shop](https://www.tolley.io/shop) — Facebook Marketplace mirror, furniture, electronics, home goods

## Contact

- Phone: 913-283-3826
- Email: Jared@yourkchomes.com

## Machine-Readable Endpoints

- MCP Server: https://www.tolley.io/api/mcp
- Agent Card: https://www.tolley.io/.well-known/agent-card.json
